title: CO-Bench
description: Evolve the editable CO-Bench wrapper independently for each official problem, using local dataset preparation and the checked-in official evaluation framework.
baseline_summary: Checked-in CO-Bench baseline that defines a direct solve(**kwargs) program for the active optimization problem.
prompt_context: Edit editable.py only. The active item is one CO-Bench problem. Implement def solve(**kwargs) directly for that problem using only the Python standard library. The verifier will score your returned solution dict with the official CO-Bench evaluator.

objective_spec.summary_template: Higher average normalized CO-Bench test score is better across independently evolved problem runs.
